summary: Iteration 112 - Testing 4 features: (1) Boost Request for priority in queue, (2) Hide Gallery Pricing for Grom Parents, (3) Fix Verify Age button in Grom HQ, (4) Add Family Chat tab for Grom Parents. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Fixed missing database columns (boost_priority, boost_expires_at, boost_credits_spent) via migration. Frontend: All features verified working.

minor.issue: Database columns were missing - FIXED via migration

critical_code_review_comments: GalleryPage.js correctly hides Pricing card for Grom Parents via isGromParent check (line 97-100)
MessagesPage.js correctly shows Family folder for Grom Parents and Groms (lines 70-100)
MapPage.js has Boost Request UI with tiered pricing (5/10/20 credits for 1/2/4 hours) at lines 1709-1759
dispatch.py boost_dispatch_request() correctly charges credits and sets boost_priority
grom_hq.py demo_verify_age() correctly sets parent_age_verified=true (MOCKED - bypasses Stripe Identity)
messages.py get_family_members_to_message() and get_family_conversations() correctly return linked family
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 features verified: (1) Boost Request - backend endpoints working, UI in MapPage Request Pro modal with tiered pricing. (2) Gallery Pricing hidden for Grom Parents - verified via code and UI. (3) Demo Verify Age - endpoint working (MOCKED - bypasses Stripe Identity). (4) Family Chat - Family folder visible in Messages, backend endpoints returning linked family members.
